name: Name
recipientAddPopUpTitle: Add a single recipient to one or more groups
incorrectRecipientInput: None of the clients have either valid email or valid cellphone
addRecTextareaPlaceholder: Drag & Drop an XLS/CSV file or copy and paste the details directly into this box. You may also enter manually, by adding a comma between values. You are able to enter hundreds of thousands of recipients to this box
unsubTextareaPlaceholder: Drag & Drop an XLS/CSV file or copy and paste the details directly into this box. You may also enter manually, by adding the number or email that you want to unsubscribe on each line. You are able to enter hundreds of thousands of recipients to this box.
deleteTextareaPlaceholder: Drag & Drop an XLS/CSV file or copy and paste the details directly into this box. You may also enter manually, by entering emails and cellphones that you would like to remove. Separate each email or cellphone by new line. You are able to enter hundreds of thousands of recipients to this box

importResponses.fileUploaded:
The file was successfully recorded on our system!
The upload will take place the next few minutes.
You can track the file upload status on the Upload History page under Groups menu.
importResponses.inputIncorrect: The input is in incorrect format, invalid columns
importResponses.listEmptyOrClientInvalid: List is empty or Client information is invalid, for instance -  Cellphone column assigned to an Email property, etc.

responses.serverFoundWithNoResponse: The request accepted by server, but no response has been sent. Please contact support
responses.notFound: No recipients has been found for unsubscribe

unsubscribed.succeeded: The recipients successfully unsubscribed from the selected groups

bulkRecUpldTooltipText: You are able to upload up to 600,000 recipients at once
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete recipients from the following groups
